summary: Submitted a pull request to the runx repository adding a quickstart example for new users. The PR adds a README showing how to create and run a simple runx skill.
audience: runx developers and new users exploring the project
why_authentic: Original contribution to the runx open source project. Adds real value for new users by providing a quickstart guide. PR is public, reviewed, and linked to runx.ai and github.com/runxhq/runx.
